sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74817" key="o)reinome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρει-νομέω</orth>, <sense id="n74817.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">graze</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">live on the hills,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
